properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It’s a highway to Heaven, none can walk up there but the pure in heart. It’s a highway to Heaven, walkin’ up the King’s highway.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If you’re not walkin’ start while I’m talkin’, walkin’ up the King’s highway. Christ walks beside you, angels will guide you when you’re walkin’ up the King’s highway.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And it’s a highway to Heaven, none can walk up there but the pure in heart. It’s a highway to Heaven, walkin’ up the King’s highway.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My way gets brighter, my load gets lighter walkin’ up the King’s highway. And you’ll be confessing that there is a blessing when you’re walkin’ up the King’s highway.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It’s a highway to Heaven, none can walk up there but the pure in heart. It’s a highway to Heaven, walkin’ up the King’s highway.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It’s a highway, it’s a highway, it’s a highway up to Heaven, None can walk up there but the pure in heart. It’s a highway, it’s a highway, It’s a highway up to Heaven.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I’m walkin’ up the King’s, walkin’ up the King’s highway!
